_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in communicating research findings to both technical and non-technical audiences, including paper writing, conference presentation, and internal briefing formats.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-009 (LS, cosine: 0.431), AI-S-008 (AI, cosine: 0.427).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.530). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [communications, gisting, target] vs WIDAI-only terms [audiences, briefing, communicating, conference, findings, formats] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.880, R=0.844). P exceeds R by 0.036 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Skill in gisting target communications." and "Skill in communicating research findings to both technical and non-technical aud" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.435 < STS 0.530 (gap -0.095). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [communications, gisting, target] and [audiences, briefing, communicating] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [communications, gisting, target]. WIDAI-only: [audiences, briefing, communicating, conference, findings, formats].
